title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: - **Medium**: `[~/.claude/AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/AGENTS.md#L4)` is a compatibility markdown introduced by the merge and explicitly claims it is still needed by tools (“exists for tools that still read `~/.claude/AGENTS.md`”). Deleting it is **not safe** without a tool-level audit, even though current launch-path files don’t import it directly. - **Low**: `[FUGUE.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/docs/FUGUE.md#L1)` and `[KERNEL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/docs/KERNEL.md#L1)` are now pointer-only compatibility notes; current launch-path files `[AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L14)`, `[CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CLAUDE.md#L10)`, and `[CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L10)` do not reference them. They are **safe to delete for runtime** if simulation is clean. - **Low**: If `[FUGUE.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/docs/FUGUE.md)` / `[KERNEL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/docs/KERNEL.md)` are deleted, `[step-summary.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/.github/step-summary.md#L5)` will contain stale artifact references (`docs/FUGUE.md`, `docs/KERNEL.md`). This is a documentation breakage, not a launch/runtime breakage.
